_meta.structure: level → duration_min → { meta, variants: [A, B, C] }
_meta.timing_note: Mobility sessions are measured differently from workouts. 5 min = 2–3 drills.

drills.name: Kneeling Spiderman Rock
drills.instruction: Half-keeling with front foot wide. Lean into front knee, shifting weight forward. Rock gently.

drills.name: Kneeling Adductor Cossack Rock
drills.instruction: Kneel wide, forearms on ground. Rock hips side to side slowly. No bouncing.

drills.name: Supported Squat Prying
drills.instruction: Hold support, sit in deep squat. Use elbows to pry knees outward.

drills.name: Supine Belly Breath
drills.instruction: Breathe deeply into belly for 4s inhale, 4s exhale.

drills.name: Hooklying Hip Internal Rotation
drills.instruction: Lie on back, feet wide, knees falling inward toward each other.

drills.name: Rocking Hip Flexor Mobilization
drills.instruction: Half kneeling. Squeeze back glute hard. Rock forward into stretch.

drills.name: Supine Knee Extension
drills.instruction: Lie on back, hug knee, try to extend leg toward ceiling.

drills.name: Reclining Pigeon
drills.instruction: Figure four on back. Pull shin toward torso. Back flat.

drills.name: Supine Belly Breath
drills.instruction: 6-8 cycles of deep nasal belly breathing.

drills.name: Single & Double Knee Hugs
drills.instruction: Hug knee to armpit one at a time, then both to chest.

drills.name: Reclining Pigeon
drills.instruction: Figure four on back. Breathe into the outer hip/glute.

drills.name: Cobra to Child's Pose
drills.instruction: Flow between spinal extension (cobra) and flexion (child's pose).

drills.name: Dynamic Standing Sequence
drills.instruction: Arm circles and 'helicopter' passive arm swings.

drills.name: Overhead Reach to Toe Touch
drills.instruction: Dynamic reps: reach high, fold from hips, touch toes.

drills.name: 90/90 Hip Switch
drills.instruction: Seated shin box. Transition knees side to side with tall torso.

drills.name: Rear Foot Elevated Quad Stretch
drills.instruction: Half kneeling, back foot on bench. Squeeze glute, tuck tailbone.

drills.name: Staggered Stance Hinge
drills.instruction: Flat back hinge from staggered stance. Load the forward hamstring.

drills.name: Tall Heel Sit Neck Rolls
drills.instruction: Sit on heels, hands on head. Move head slowly, hands rest (no push).

drills.name: Half Kneeling Bow & Arrow
drills.instruction: Half kneel. Draw top hand back like pulling a bowstring. Rotate spine.

drills.name: Heel Sit Overhead Reach
drills.instruction: Reach high, biceps to ears. Actively pull down, squeezing lats.

drills.name: Seated Shoulder Butterflies
drills.instruction: Hands on shoulders, draw largest possible circles with elbows.

drills.name: Seated Wall Slide
drills.instruction: Back against wall. Slide arms up in 'W' to 'Y' shape. Keep wall contact.

drills.name: Standing Belly Breath
drills.instruction: Full nasal inhale into abdomen. Engage core lightly.

drills.name: Large Arm Circles
drills.instruction: Arms wide, circle from shoulder in both directions.

drills.name: Helicopter passive swings
drills.instruction: Twist from ankles/hips, letting arms swing and slap torso.

drills.name: Dynamic Front Kick
drills.instruction: Kick leg straight, reach opposite hand to toes. Hamstring focus.

drills.name: Standing Side Leg Raise
drills.instruction: Swing leg inward across body, then raise outward high as possible.

drills.name: Hip CARs
drills.instruction: Single leg balance. Large controlled hip circles.

drills.name: Reach to Toe Touch
drills.instruction: Maximize reach, bend from hips, pause at bottom.

drills.name: Advanced Hip CARs
drills.instruction: Standing hip circles with maximum muscular tension throughout.

drills.name: Full Cossack Squats
drills.instruction: Deep lateral squat. One leg straight, toes up. Alternate sides low.

drills.name: Alternate Nostril Breathing
drills.instruction: Inhale one side, switch, exhale. Maximize parasympathetic shift.

drills.name: Shin Box Transitions
drills.instruction: 90/90 side switches with no hand support. Maximize control.

drills.name: Shin on Wall + T-Spine
drills.instruction: Deepest quad stretch with knee at wall and torso rotation.

drills.name: Jefferson Curl (Loaded)
drills.instruction: Hold light weight. Roll down vertebra by vertebra. Hang at bottom.

drills.name: Max Tension Hip CARs
drills.instruction: Slow, high-tension hip circles to consolidate range.

drills.name: Standing Back & Forward Bends
drills.instruction: Full spine extension followed by deep chest-to-thigh fold.

drills.name: Down Dog to Up Dog Flow
drills.instruction: Inhale to cobra/up-dog, exhale to down-dog. Hold 3 cycles each.

drills.name: Kneeling Lunge + Foot Grab
drills.instruction: Deep lunge, grab back foot. Ultimate quad/flexor opening.

drills.name: Lateral Squat Windmill
drills.instruction: Hold lateral squat. Weight overhead, reach free hand to floor.

drills.name: Straight & German Hangs
drills.instruction: Passive hang from bar. If ready, skin the cat to German hang.

drills.name: SL Deadlift with Reach
drills.instruction: SL RDL pattern reaching one arm low and other to ceiling.

drills.name: Squat ISO Elbow Pry
drills.instruction: Deepest hold, prying knees wide rhythmically with exhale.
